The team

Three people. One posture.

Brad Brisco, Alan Hirsch, and Joshua Shepherd.

Start a conversation See trusted voices
Founders

The people holding the pen.

Each carries decades of missional and technical experience.

Brad Brisco

Co-Founder & Missiologist

Kansas City, MO

Brad brings deep expertise in church planting and missional theology, focusing on the intersection of movement dynamics and local context.

Credentials & Context
  • Author of multiple missional texts
  • Director of Bivocational Church Planting
  • Decades of pastoral coaching

Alan Hirsch

Co-Founder & Thought Leader

Melbourne, AUS

Recognized globally for his work on movemental ecclesiology, Alan's thinking forms the foundational architecture of our approach.

Credentials & Context
  • Founder of 100Movements
  • Author of The Forgotten Ways
  • Global movement architect

Joshua Shepherd

Co-Founder & Technologist

Austin, TX

Joshua translates complex missiological concepts into scalable digital infrastructure, ensuring the theology finds practical application.

Credentials & Context
  • Platform Architect
  • Systems Design Specialist
  • Digital Ministry Innovator
How we lead

Our methodology is not abstract theory; it is the practiced reality of our own work together.

The same Sequence we ask of you, we walk ourselves.

01

Safety

Establishing trust and baseline security before attempting complex movemental shifts.

02

Sandbox

Creating low-stakes environments for experimentation and learning without catastrophic risk.

03

Skills

Developing the specific competencies required to sustain movement dynamics over time.

04

Solutions

Deploying robust, contextually appropriate answers to systemic challenges.

If this resonates

We would like to hear what you are facing.

Schedule a thirty-minute introductory call to explore alignment and potential pathways forward.
